reasoning: Dan Osborn formed an exploratory committee for a 2026 Senate run against Sen. Pete Ricketts on April 3, 2025. Only a week later, his committee released a poll showing him tied with Ricketts. This rapid succession of campaign-like activities strongly indicates he is moving quickly toward a formal run. While 2026 is still a long way off, exploratory committees often culminate in an official launch within 1 to 3 months, which overlaps closely with the June 1, 2025 deadline framework. Since the deadline is only slightly under two months from his initial exploration announcement, there is a risk he waits until summer or early fall (which would resolve NO). However, his immediate release of internal polling and active media statements makes an earlier, momentum-sustaining announcement before June 1 more likely than not.
